description_long: This rifle features a robust, angular body with a predominantly olive green and black color scheme, accented by yellow and orange markings. The stock is skeletonized with three large circular cutouts, providing a lightweight yet sturdy rear support. The main receiver is boxy and industrial, with visible mechanical details and a prominent cylindrical component near the top, possibly a gas tube or part of the action. A metallic rod runs parallel beneath the barrel, likely serving as a structural or functional support. The magazine appears to be a detachable box type, partially exposed along the underside. The overall design suggests a modern, tactical firearm suitable for urban environments, with a focus on durability and modularity.
description: A modern, tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, boxy olive green receiver, and visible mechanical details. Accented with yellow and orange markings, it features a detachable box magazine and a robust, industrial design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the skeletonized stock, boxy receiver, and parallel support rod beneath the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the muzzle, cylindrical upper component, and the compact width of the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and mechanical details on the receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the skeletonized stock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
